# Budibase

Official website for Budibase.

- Canonical site: https://budibase.com/
- Sitemap: https://budibase.com/sitemap.xml
- Docs: https://docs.budibase.com/

## Pricing

- [Pricing page](https://budibase.com/pricing): Human-readable pricing page
- [Pricing JSON](https://budibase.com/pricing.json): Canonical structured pricing data for agents
- [Pricing JSON](https://budibase.com/feature-matrix.json): Canonical structured feature matrix (Compare plans) for agents
